mapper.select: SELECT * FROM confirmation_record WHERE monitoring_id = #{monitoringId} AND institution_id = #{institutionId}
SELECT * FROM confirmation_record WHERE monitoring_id = #{monitoringId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM confirmation_record WHERE monitoring_id = #{monitoringId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM confirmation_record WHERE monitoring_id = #{monitoringId} AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO confirmation_record (monitoring_id, institution_id, user_id, status) VALUES (#{monitoringId}, #{institutionId}, #{userId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE confirmation_record SET status=#{status}, confirmed_at=NOW(), remark=#{remark} WHERE id=#{id}
